platform_desc: The comprehensive platform to manage, analyze, and evaluate student results easily and professionally.
settings_desc: Change the application appearance or control theme options and language.
feedback_msg: Before you leave, we'd like to know your opinion of the platform. Your rating helps us improve.
logging_out: We appreciate your time. Logging out...
suggestions: Do you have any suggestions or feedback? (Optional)
excel_format_warning: Please ensure the file is in Excel format and contains the columns: Name, and Subjects.
practical_work_desc: When this option is enabled, a 'Practical Work' field is added and the average is calculated as follows: (Evaluation + Practical + Quiz + Exam×2) / 5.
choose_report_type: Choose the type of report you want to extract
comprehensive_analysis_desc: Statistical analysis for all combined classes
choose_class_for_report: Choose the class to extract its report
all_classes_combined: All classes combined in one list
certificates_desc: Certificates of appreciation for top students
review_data_before_pdf: Review data before exporting to PDF
process_complete_soon: The process will complete in seconds
no_data_msg: No data available. Please upload an Excel file.
very_poor_results: Very poor results, immediate action required
calculation_formula_desc: Calculated according to the Algerian educational system: Subject Average = (Evaluation + Practical + Quiz + Exam × 2) / Total
absent_grades_desc: In case some grades are absent, the divisor (Total) is adjusted automatically
subject: Subject
csv_parse_error: Error parsing CSV file. Please check the format.
showing_first_50: Showing first 50 students only out of total {{count}}
show_full_list: Showing full list ({{count}} students) for review before final calculation.
upload_excel_desc: Upload a file containing student names and their grades. The app will organize and analyze results automatically.
name_column_not_found: Name column not found. Please ensure there is a column named 'Name'.
responsible_teacher_desc: Upload the class Excel file (containing student names and grades for each subject) for accurate analysis.
overview_analysis_msg: 1. **Overview:** The class achieved a success rate of {{rate}}% with an overall average of {{avg}}. We note {{strong}} students with outstanding levels versus {{weak}} students who need follow-up.
strong_subjects_msg: 2. **Strengths:** Significant positive results were recorded in subjects ({{subjects}}) where the success rate exceeded 70%.
weak_subjects_msg: 3. **Weaknesses:** Subjects ({{subjects}}) need an urgent remedial plan as the success rate is below 50%.
pedagogical_gap_msg: 4. **Pedagogical Note:** There is a large gap between the highest and lowest average ({{gap}} points), which calls for efforts to narrow the differences between students through a targeted support strategy.
recommendation_msg: 5. **Recommendation:** It is advised to hold a mini-class council to discuss the deterioration of results in weak subjects and value the efforts of top-performing students.
professional_info_desc: Please confirm your professional information before generating the report to ensure it appears correctly in the file.
feedback_msg: We always strive for the best, your opinion matters to us in improving the platform. How was your experience?
suggestions: Do you have any suggestions or comments?
no_data_warning: No data currently. Please upload an Excel file.
csv_parse_error: Error reading CSV file. Please check the format.
showing_limit: Showing first 50 students only out of {{count}} students
full_list_preview: Showing full list ({{count}} students) for review before final calculation.
upload_excel_desc: Upload a file containing students' names and grades. The app will organize and analyze the results automatically.
logout_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to logout? All entered data will be permanently cleared.
